rows.text:
CASE UPDATE from @FBMilwaukee: Woman Wanted for Murder in Mexico Arrested for Illegal Reentry in Western Wisconsin

On April 2, 2026, the FBI National Threat Operations Center received a report that a woman living and working in Wisconsin was a suspect in a July 2025 homicide in Mexico. FBI personnel in Mexico coordinated with Mexican authorities to confirm that Alejandra Sanchez-Cuaquehua, 32, was a wanted fugitive, and that she had previously been removed from the United States and did not have permission to return. 

More information about the investigation by the #FBI and our partners: https://t.co/yKw5VHe633
rows.text_resolved:
CASE UPDATE from @FBMilwaukee: Woman Wanted for Murder in Mexico Arrested for Illegal Reentry in Western Wisconsin

On April 2, 2026, the FBI National Threat Operations Center received a report that a woman living and working in Wisconsin was a suspect in a July 2025 homicide in Mexico. FBI personnel in Mexico coordinated with Mexican authorities to confirm that Alejandra Sanchez-Cuaquehua, 32, was a wanted fugitive, and that she had previously been removed from the United States and did not have permission to return. 

More information about the investigation by the #FBI and our partners: http://justice.gov/usao-wdwi/pr/woman-wanted-murder-mexico-arrested-illegal-reentry-western-wisconsin

rows.text:
No individuals were directly struck by pepper ball projectiles.
 
On May 25, 2026, rioters obstructed law enforcement from exiting the ICE facility. Officers issued multiple lawful verbal commands for rioters to clear the area. Rioters refused to follow law enforcement commands and continue to obstruct the exit route. Our law enforcement followed their training and used the minimum amount of force necessary to protect themselves, the public, and federal property.
 
The First Amendment protects speech and peaceful assembly – not rioting. DHS is taking appropriate and constitutional measures to uphold the rule of law and protect our officers and the public from dangerous rioters.  
 
We remind the public that rioting is dangerous—obstructing law enforcement is a federal crime and assaulting law enforcement is a felony.
rows.text_resolved:

rows.text:
This is nothing more than a political stunt by New Jersey sanctuary politicians for fundraising clicks. 

There is NO hunger strike at Delaney Hall. There are no subprime conditions.
 
@SenBooker, @SenatorAndyKim, @RepMenendez, @RepNellie, @FrankPallone, @GovSherrillNJ and dozens of New Jersey sanctuary politicians chose to spend their Memorial Day weekend smearing ICE law enforcement. They should be thanking our law enforcement for removing these murderers, pedophiles, rapists, and drug traffickers from their state.

Would these sanctuary politicians like to house these criminals in their homes or have them as neighbors?
 
We need these sanctuary politicians to stop peddling this garbage and cooperate with us to get these criminals out of their state.

rows.text:
Local law enforcement in California accused Aman Kumar, of India, of striking a 4-year-old boy with his vehicle and fleeing the scene of the accident. The boy is expected to survive but tragically sustained critical injuries.

Due to sanctuary policies, the state released 30-year-old Kumar from jail despite knowing he is an illegal alien facing felony hit-and-run charges.

Kumar is currently in removal proceedings, so ICE had to assemble a larger team and apprehend him in the community because California jails refuse to work with ICE.

🔎Currently, more than 33,000 illegal immigrants in California custody have active detainer requests tied to crimes ranging from homicide and assault to robbery, drug offenses, weapons crimes, and sexual predatory offenses.

rows.text:
.@POTUS: "Scripture tells us, 'Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his faithful servants.' 400,000 souls rest on these grounds... in this sacred soil, which was first consecrated in the hour of America’s greatest Division to be an eternal symbol of our National Unity. It cannot be by chance alone that the very first servicemember laid to rest here, in this place of supreme sacrifice, was a Union Soldier by the name of Private Christman—Private William Henry Christman of Pennsylvania, who died at 19 years old...

Beside him are more than 18,000 other young men named William, over 20,000 named John, over 13,000 named James, joined over time by Issacs, Elijahs, Earls, Hanks, Helens... and others whose names tell the true story of American Greatness...

Here, beneath arching trees and white stones, these many are made one again—united forever as brothers and sisters in arms, and children of our Father in Heaven."
rows.text_resolved:
.@POTUS: "Scripture tells us, 'Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his faithful servants.' 400,000 souls rest on these grounds... in this sacred soil, which was first consecrated in the hour of America’s greatest Division to be an eternal symbol of our National Unity. It cannot be by chance alone that the very first servicemember laid to rest here, in this place of supreme sacrifice, was a Union Soldier by the name of Private Christman—Private William Henry Christman of Pennsylvania, who died at 19 years old...

Beside him are more than 18,000 other young men named William, over 20,000 named John, over 13,000 named James, joined over time by Issacs, Elijahs, Earls, Hanks, Helens... and others whose names tell the true story of American Greatness...

Here, beneath arching trees and white stones, these many are made one again—united forever as brothers and sisters in arms, and children of our Father in Heaven."

author.description: Official White House Rapid Response account. Supporting @POTUS's America First agenda and holding the Fake News accountable. MAGA!

rows.text:
.@POTUS “In two hundred and fifty years, America’s heroes have saved more lives, freed more captives, accomplished more good, and spread more hope than any other people at any time in the history of the world.

Whole nations now know liberty. Entire generations know freedom. Billions of people have been delivered from poverty, tyranny, and oppression.

Because of the sacrifices, we honor this day.”
rows.text_resolved:
.@POTUS “In two hundred and fifty years, America’s heroes have saved more lives, freed more captives, accomplished more good, and spread more hope than any other people at any time in the history of the world.

Whole nations now know liberty. Entire generations know freedom. Billions of people have been delivered from poverty, tyranny, and oppression.

Because of the sacrifices, we honor this day.”

author.description: Welcome to the Official Rapid Response Account of the Department of War.

rows.text:
.@POTUS: "From 1776 to 2026, America has always stood as a great and moral cause. Our warriors are no mere mercenaries, they are guardian angels who stride across the battlefields of history and stand watch over the highest and most beautiful planes the human spirit has ever seen—holding the line between liberty and tyranny, between civilization and barbarism, between good and evil. Wherever the American Soldier walks, wherever he fights... and wherever he falls, he does it for the destiny of a nation like no other... and for the fate of Freedom on this earth...

By their deaths, those who have gone before us in battle have redeemed the promise of our Founding for each future generation.

They've not just made the Ultimate Sacrifice, they have offered the Ultimate Proof that we Americans do indeed love Liberty. We do cherish the self-government given to us by our forefathers. We do believe with all our souls in the mission that God has given to America. And we do intend with all our strength and heart to hold high the torch our heroes handed to us—and we will never, ever let it fall."
rows.text_resolved:
.@POTUS: "From 1776 to 2026, America has always stood as a great and moral cause. By their deaths, those who have gone before us in battle have redeemed the promise of our Founding for each future generation.

They've not just made the Ultimate Sacrifice, they have offered the Ultimate Proof that we Americans do indeed love Liberty. We do cherish the self-government given to us by our forefathers. We do believe with all our souls in the mission that God has given to America. And we do intend with all our strength and heart to hold high the torch our heroes handed to us—and we will never, ever let it fall."

author.description: Official White House Rapid Response account. Supporting @POTUS's America First agenda and holding the Fake News accountable. MAGA!

rows.text:
.@POTUS “Before we hail the founding—we honor the fallen. Before we celebrate the triumph—we pay tribute. Before we crown the victory—we count the cost.

Today, we are reminded that there could be no Fourth of July without America’s Armed Forces, and there could be no Independence Day without Memorial Day.

We owe our liberty, ourselves, our self-government, the glories of our history, and the very nature of our nation itself to the generations who paid for it with EVERYTHING THEY HAD—THE ULTIMATE SACRIFICE.”
rows.text_resolved:

rows.text_resolved:
.@SECWAR “They fought not because they hate what was in front of them, but because they loved what was behind them.

And, so, may the ones we remember today live on in every flag that flies… 

May they live in our prayers to Almighty God." https://t.co/6uofxpt8ka

author.description: Welcome to the Official Rapid Response Account of the Department of War.

rows.text:
.@SECWAR “Picnics, barbecues, and time at the beach—those things are wonderful aspects of Memorial Day weekend... but on this solemn day, WE MUST REMEMBER THAT OUR REPUBLIC WAS FORGED AND PURCHASED WITH BLOOD.

AMERICAN BLOOD.” https://t.co/11ckZeJC9U
